title: Batticuore
writer: Mario Camerini, Renato Castellani, Lilly Janüsse
actors: Assia Noris, John Lodge, Rubi Dalma
plot: The sole girl pupil of a school for pickpockets is caught in the act stealing from a well dressed Count but he hires her to steal the watch of an ambassador who he thinks is having an affair with the countess.
